description:
Clief Notes Community (free): https://www.skool.com/quantum-quill-lyceum-1116/about

Most people using AI are stuck in a loop. Open a chat, paste a prompt, get something back, start over. I built a folder system that replaces that entire process.

In this video I walk through my complete workspace architecture: how I use folders and markdown files to route Claude to the right context every time, without agents, without frameworks, without code. I built a template you can download and apply to your own workflows today.

This covers the full concept from the ground up. If you already know what markdown is and how VS Code works, you'll still get plenty from the architecture breakdown and the three layer routing system. If you're brand new to all of this, I explain every concept along the way.


TIMESTAMPS
0:00 What this video covers
1:15 The problem with how most people use AI
3:30 What tokens are and why context windows matter
5:45 The workspace blueprint: three workspaces for three kinds of work
7:00 What VS Code is and why I use it (you dont have to)
8:30 Markdown explained: what it is, where it came from, why it matters
10:45 The CLAUDE.md file: the first thing every AI reads
12:30 The three layer routing system explained
14:00 Layer 1: Top level identity and navigation
15:30 Layer 2: Workspace level context files
17:00 Layer 3: Skills, MCP servers, and plug and play tools
19:00 Naming conventions that replace databases
20:30 How to make this yours: content creators, freelancers, developers
22:00 The research paper behind all of this
23:00 Where to get the template



Connect with me:
Instagram: @lostandlucky
TikTok: @JEVanClief
YouTube: @JEVanClief
